name: Pork with Clams (Porco Com Ameijoas a Alentejana)
recipeInstructions:
Step 1: Combine cubed pork with white wine, paprika, bay leaf, cloves, pepper, and the equivalent of 3 crushed garlic cloves in a dish. Cover and refrigerate overnight, turning occasionally.
Step 2: In a large saucepan, melt 1 ounce margarine. Add onions and tomatoes, cooking gently until onions are soft (add salt and pepper to taste).
Step 3: Wash clams and discard any that are open. Add clams to the onion/tomato mixture. Cover and cook on high heat until all clams have opened (about 5 minutes), then cook for another minute.
Step 4: Drain pork, keeping marinade. Heat remaining margarine in a large frying pan. Brown pork on all sides over medium heat. Add marinade and continue cooking until very little liquid remains.
Step 5: Serve pork with clams in their shells and onion mixture, accompanied by boiled potatoes. Sprinkle with coriander and parsley, garnishing with lemon quarters.
